entity.summary: Flow ecosystem decentralized exchange providing spot token swaps through versioned V2 and V3 liquidity deployments, with current TVL, fee generation, and exchange-volume activity.
entity.notes: Current first-party FlowSwap application remains reachable as a JavaScript trading interface. DefiLlama independently reports current Flow-chain TVL, fees, and DEX volume and separates V2 and V3 implementations under the combined FlowSwap protocol. HEI consolidates those version rows into one entity.

evidence.title: FlowSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party FlowSwap application endpoint remains reachable and serves the JavaScript exchange interface.

evidence.title: FlowSwap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies FlowSwap as a DEX on Flow and reports current TVL, recent fees, recent DEX volume, and cumulative DEX volume while presenting V2 and V3 deployments under the combined protocol identity.

evidence.title: FlowSwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FlowSwap and its V2/V3 source representations on the Flow ecosystem; HEI consolidates them into one entity.
